commands: vp migrate --no-interactive # migration should detect both eslint and prettier and auto-migrate
cat package.json # check eslint and prettier removed, scripts rewritten
cat eslint.config.mjs && exit 1 || true # check eslint config is removed
cat .prettierrc.json && exit 1 || true # check prettier config is removed
cat vite.config.ts # check oxlint and oxfmt config merged into vite.config.ts
